summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json to record the deployment request as a pending feature (AR-1/REQ-1). No actual application code, configuration, or deployment artifacts were changed. The compacted punch in/out layout in ReportForm, the PDF generator, and all other application features are not reflected in any file changes — only the project state tracking file was updated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Deploy the current version of the application (with the compacted punch in/out layout in ReportForm) to production, such that the live environment reflects the compacted layout, the PDF generator renders correctly, and all previously working features remain functional.
missing_requirements.reason: No application code files, deployment scripts, configuration files, or build artifacts were modified. The diff only updates project_state.json to mark the request as 'pending', meaning no actual deployment or code promotion has taken place.
